name: LuxNet Corporation
summary: LuxNet Corporation designs, develops, and manufactures optical semiconductor devices and packaged optical components in Taiwan. The company provides laser and photo diode chips, transmitters, receivers, and optical sub-assemblies. Its products are used in high speed voice video and data communications for networking, storage, and cable TV, as well as optical communication applications. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
